summary: Tested Soul Made™ custom order trigger buttons across 11 pillar pages. All 11 pillar pages with Soul Made triggers passed. Emergency page correctly does NOT have the trigger. Farewell page has custom 'In memory of {petName}' text. SoulMadeModal opens correctly with product list, photo upload flow, and message step.

issues: Subtitle text color rgba(245,240,232,0.4) is very faint on light backgrounds - this is by design for dark backgrounds but may be hard to read on some pillar pages with lighter themes

critical_code_review_comments: All 11 pillar pages (Celebrate, Care, Dine, Go, Play, Learn, Shop, Paperwork, Adopt, Farewell, Services) have Soul Made trigger with data-testid='soul-made-trigger'
Emergency page correctly excluded from Soul Made feature
Farewell page has custom text: 'In memory of {petName} — create something meaningful'
SoulMadeModal has 4-step flow: product selection, photo upload, message, confirmation
Modal loads breed-specific products (e.g., Indie Bandana, Indie Lover Mug for Indie breed)
Concierge integration via useConcierge hook for ticket creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 190 tested Soul Made™ trigger buttons across all pillar pages. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, pet: Mojo (Indie breed). All 11 pillar pages have soul-made-trigger (data-testid). Emergency page correctly excluded. Farewell has custom 'In memory of' text. SoulMadeModal opens with product list, photo upload, message steps. Use mobile viewport 430x800 for testing.

farewell.custom_text: In memory of {petName} — create something meaningful

emergency.note: Correctly excluded from Soul Made feature
